scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/prerender.mjs && node scripts/validate-schemas.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js && node scripts/ping-google.js
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(({ rmSync }) => rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.render:markets: remotion render remotion/index.ts ResidentialLoop public/videos/sky-residential-loop.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=22 --muted && remotion render remotion/index.ts CommercialLoop public/videos/sky-commercial-loop.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=22 --muted && remotion render remotion/index.ts PublicSectorLoop public/videos/sky-public-sector-loop.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=22 --muted
